theme.description: Clean, rich white background B2B e-commerce platform. Focuses on technical authority, high legibility, and product visibility. Uses strong geometric typography and minimal, functional color accents to guide the 'Add to Quote' and WhatsApp workflow.

layout.sidebar: md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 sticky top-24 hidden md:block
layout.product_feed: md:col-span-9 lg:col-span-10 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

product_card.wrapper: group relative flex flex-col bg-white border border-neutral-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:border-neutral-300 transition-all duration-300
product_card.image_container: aspect-square bg-neutral-50 p-4 flex items-center justify-center relative
product_card.title: font-heading font-semibold text-neutral-900 mb-1 line-clamp-2 leading-tight
product_card.button: w-full mt-4 bg-white text-brand-primary border border-brand-primary hover:bg-brand-primary hover:text-white font-medium py-2 rounded-md transition-colors data-[testid='add-to-quote-btn']

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-[#EA580C] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:bg-[#C2410C] transition-colors
buttons.whatsapp: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-[#16A34A] px-6 py-3 text-base font-bold text-white hover:bg-[#15803D] transition-colors w-full shadow-sm

header.wrapper: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-neutral-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl
header.inner: flex h-16 items-center justify-between px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-screen-2xl mx-auto

category_solar_panels.description: Modern building with large solar panels

category_cables.description: Large industrial reel with black coiled cable

hero_banner.description: Large array of modern solar tiles

instructions_to_main_agent.store_workflow: Create a robust Shadcn 'Sheet' component for the 'Quote Cart'. When 'Add to Quote' is clicked on a product, it goes here. The sheet should display items, a subtotal, a 'Transit Mode' select dropdown (Ex-Works, Door Delivery, Transport/Freight), and a massive green WhatsApp CTA button.
instructions_to_main_agent.whatsapp_integration: The WhatsApp button MUST encode the cart contents, transit mode, and user's intent into a URL string and open `https://wa.me/918007520000?text=...`. Example: 'Hello Energica Solutions, I would like to request a quote for: 1x 12W Solar Street Light... Transit: Ex-Works.'
instructions_to_main_agent.product_pages: Implement a dynamic route for products `/product/:id`. Use a 2-column layout: left side large image + thumbnails, right side title, specs, 'Add to Quote' button, and a prominent 'Download Datasheet' secondary button (simulated PDF download link). Below, show 'Applications' and 'Similar Products' in a grid.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_panel: Build a clean `/admin` route (mocked auth is fine if not specified) with Shadcn Tabs. Tab 1: Products (Shadcn Table with Add/Edit/Delete actions for stock and prices). Tab 2: RFQs (Read-only view of past RFQs, mocked data).
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Ensure all Add to Quote buttons have `data-testid='add-to-quote-button'`, the WhatsApp submit button has `data-testid='submit-whatsapp-rfq-button'`, and category filters use `data-testid='category-filter-[name]'`.
